title: Pure Barre Launches “Platinum Barre” & “First 10” Challenge
meta_description: Pure Barre introduces new fitness challenges and expands to Mexico and Princess Cruises, promising an exciting year for members to build healthy habits and achieve their fitness goals.

####  January 3, 2025 
#  Pure Barre Launches “Platinum Barre” & “First 10” Challenge
  
The boutique barre brand is gearing up for an exciting year as it expands to Mexico and hits the high seas with Princess Cruises
Pure Barre has launched a series of fitness challenges for both new and current members of the Xponential Fitness-backed barre workout brand.  
  
The full-body workout method is also scheduled to set sail with Princess Cruises this summer for Pure Barre at Sea: A Tropical Retreat.  
  
“As the leader in barre fitness, Pure Barre is committed to empowering members to build healthy habits and create lasting change,” Pure Barre chief marketing officer Caroline Linton said. “These challenges provide participants with the support and motivation they need to incorporate fitness into their daily lives and achieve their goals in a meaningful and rewarding way.”
Read the full article [here](https://athletechnews.com/pure-barre-launches-platinum-barre-first-10-challenge/).
